en_title: Xbox Is Dismantling Its Future To Rebuild a Past It Can Never Recapture
cn_title: XBOX拆掉未来，只为重建再也回不去的过去
subtitle: 旧IP救不了未来

paragraphs.en: It is an old story - told to me nearly a decade ago by those who lived it - but it bears repeating now. Fallout was invented only because its paymasters weren’t paying attention. Developed in the bowels of Interplay during the publisher’s 90s heyday, the classic RPG benefited from a chaotic and noisy company atmosphere, in which developers divided themselves into cliques reminiscent of high school.
paragraphs.cn: 这是一个老故事——近十年前，亲历者曾向我讲述——但现在值得重提。《辐射》之所以能诞生，只因出资方没有留意它。它在Interplay于90年代鼎盛时期的内部深处开发，受益于公司混乱嘈杂的氛围，开发者分成一个个仿佛高中校园里的小圈子。

paragraphs.en: Fallout’s team was like the AV club on the periphery - given a vague mandate to start a project based on a tabletop ruleset. Lead producer and programmer Tim Cain would send out emails saying, “I’m in Conference Room Two with a pizza,” and those who wanted to come on their own time could, to spin up ideas.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射》团队就像处在边缘的视听社团，只得到一个模糊任务：以某套桌面规则为基础启动项目。首席制作人兼程序员Tim Cain会发邮件说：「我带着披萨在二号会议室。」愿意利用私人时间参加的人便会前来，一起碰撞创意。

paragraphs.en: The Fallout team quickly rejected high fantasy. They considered concepts for time travel and generation ships, and in a way, the setting they ultimately landed on folded in aspects of both those premises. A post-apocalyptic world that was rooted in both the culture and futurism of the 1950s; where a minority of humanity was preserved in vaults, while the rest muddled through an irradiated wasteland as best they could.
paragraphs.cn: 团队很快否定了高魔奇幻，考虑过时间旅行和世代飞船等概念；某种意义上，最终设定融合了两者：一个同时扎根于1950年代文化与未来主义的末日后世界，少数人类被保存在避难所中，其余人则在受辐射污染的废土上勉力求生。

paragraphs.en: Fallout was never properly pitched to Interplay’s superiors. The publisher was distracted by shinier prospects: sports games, an online division, and a newly won Dungeons & Dragons license. While nobody was watching, the Fallout team instilled its game with a pervading moral greyness, and a commitment to mapping the consequences of player actions. It simulated drug addiction, and blowing up NPCs with dynamite. It introduced a faction of militant hoarders called the Brotherhood of Steel. The resulting RPG was decidedly odd - and only once it became an unexpected hit did Interplay start to consider Fallout a hot property.
paragraphs.cn: 《辐射》从未正式向Interplay高层提案。发行商正忙于更光鲜的项目：体育游戏、在线部门和刚取得的《龙与地下城》授权。无人关注时，团队为游戏注入贯穿始终的道德灰度，并坚持呈现玩家行为的后果。游戏模拟毒瘾，允许用炸药炸死NPC，还引入了名为钢铁兄弟会的武装囤积者阵营。成品RPG显得格外古怪；直到意外走红后，Interplay才把《辐射》视为热门资产。

paragraphs.en: There is no chance that a series like Fallout could be kickstarted at Xbox today. Yes, CEO Asha Sharma is evidently interested in continuing the blockbuster franchise that Fallout has become; a recent Bloomberg report suggested that Obsidian’s upcoming sequel to Avowed had been cancelled in favour of another Fallout . But whatever Xbox’s next Fallout might have been - the oddity in the corner that thrives without oversight and unexpectedly becomes beloved - will have died on July 6, when Sharma announced “the most significant restructure in Xbox history”.
paragraphs.cn: 如今的XBOX不可能再启动《辐射》这样的系列。首席执行官Asha Sharma显然希望延续如今已成巨作的《辐射》；彭博社近期报道称，黑曜石即将推出的《宣誓》续作已被取消，以便转做另一款《辐射》。但XBOX原本可能诞生的下一个《辐射》——那个在监管之外蓬勃生长、意外赢得喜爱的角落怪作——已在7月6日死去，那天Sharma宣布了「XBOX史上最重大的重组」。

paragraphs.en: Over what is sure to be a painful and fearful year for Xbox employees, 3,200 people are set to leave the company. 1,600 have already lost their jobs, and four studios have been shown the door. Double Fine and Compulsion will return to independent status; Ninja Theory and Undead Labs have found new homes. A fifth studio, Arkane Lyon, is likely to be handed off to a new owner too. The alternative, too grim to contemplate, is that Lyon will go the same way as its Austin counterpart, cut down like the Sycamore Gap tree .
paragraphs.cn: 对XBOX员工而言，这注定是痛苦恐惧的一年：3200人将离开公司，其中1600人已经失业，四家工作室被扫地出门。Double Fine和Compulsion将恢复独立，Ninja Theory与Undead Labs找到了新东家；第五家Arkane Lyon也可能被移交给新所有者。另一个不忍设想的结果，是Lyon重蹈Austin工作室覆辙，像Sycamore Gap那棵树一样被砍倒。

paragraphs.en: The reasoning behind both the acquisition and departure of these studios is fairly clear. For a long time, under previous CEO Phil Spencer, the prevailing Xbox strategy was to fuel Game Pass with the widest possible variety of irresistible games. During this push to make Xbox a subscription company, even something as marvellously esoteric as Obsidian’s Pentiment had its place - signalling that Game Pass was home to both bombastic shooters and monkish murder investigations.
paragraphs.cn: 收购和抛弃这些工作室的理由都很清楚。长期以来，在前任首席执行官菲尔·斯宾塞主导下，XBOX的策略是用尽可能丰富、诱人的游戏为Game Pass供给内容。在把XBOX变成订阅公司的过程中，即便是黑曜石《隐迹渐现》这样奇妙而冷门的作品也有位置，表明Game Pass既容纳火爆射击游戏，也容纳修道院谋杀调查。

paragraphs.en: But Game Pass hasn’t quite worked out, and Xbox’s priorities once again resemble those of a traditional big-budget publisher. “It is neither possible nor desirable to own every great independent studio,” Sharma said. “We have also learned that we are not the best home for every type of studio; in a typical year, we lost 64 cents for every dollar we invested.”
paragraphs.cn: 但Game Pass并未完全奏效，XBOX的优先事项再次接近传统大预算发行商。Sharma说：「拥有每一家优秀独立工作室既不可能，也不可取。我们也认识到，并非每类工作室都最适合留在我们这里；通常每投入1美元(约合人民币7元)，我们就会亏损64美分。」

paragraphs.en: Nobody expects Xbox to steer unprofitable studios through the games industry’s most dramatic downturn in decades (though let’s be honest, it absolutely could, were Microsoft not hell bent on shovelling billions into its AI furnace and chasing never-ending growth for shareholders). Still: Sharma has made an overcorrection. The funding of developers like Double Fine and Arkane has not been a favour nor a subsidy, but an investment in the new ideas that Xbox desperately needs.
paragraphs.cn: 没人指望XBOX在游戏业数十年来最严重的低迷期扶持亏损工作室（不过说实话，如果微软不是执意把数十亿美元投入AI熔炉并为股东追逐无止境增长，它完全有能力这么做）。但Sharma矫枉过正了。资助Double Fine和Arkane并非施舍或补贴，而是在投资XBOX迫切需要的新创意。

paragraphs.en: These studios have proven themselves to be dizzingly creative. In its history, Double Fine has only made two sequels - Costume Quest 2 and Psychonauts 2 - amid a wildly original catalogue that includes a sentient lighthouse simulator, a body-swapping Metroidvania, an XCOM-style riff on feudal genealogy, and precisely one RTS tribute to heavy metal album art.
paragraphs.cn: 这些工作室已证明自己拥有惊人的创造力。Double Fine历史上只做过两款续作——《万圣节大作战2》和《意航员2》——其余作品极富原创性，包括有意识的灯塔模拟器、身体互换类银河战士恶魔城、以封建族谱为主题的XCOM式游戏，以及向重金属唱片封面致敬的即时战略游戏。

paragraphs.en: Arkane Lyon, meanwhile, is widely acknowledged as one of the medium’s leaders in dense, engrossing world design. That’s evident to anyone who’s played Dishonored, Deathloop, or Dark Messiah of Might and Magic. Arkane’s worldbuilding has combined industrial Victoriana and bohemian witch covens; subarctic fishing villages and immortal party people. These unlikely mashups haven’t felt jarring in their juxtaposition, but instead grounded and believable. Much the way Fallout was, when Cain’s team married Atomic Age kitsch to wasteland horror.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，Arkane Lyon被公认为稠密沉浸式世界设计领域的领导者之一，玩过《耻辱》《死亡循环》或《黑暗弥赛亚》的人都能看出来。Arkane把工业维多利亚风与波希米亚女巫集会、亚寒带渔村与不死派对客结合起来。这些不寻常的混搭并不突兀，反而扎实可信，就像Cain团队把原子时代媚俗与废土恐怖结合成《辐射》一样。

paragraphs.en: Not all of Double Fine or Arkane’s games have been breakout hits. In fact, most haven’t. But if Xbox wants to future-proof its output, to find the Fallouts of tomorrow, it needs to incubate strange new ideas. To take the relatively inexpensive risks which, over the long run, can produce behemoth franchises.
paragraphs.cn: Double Fine或Arkane并非每款游戏都成为爆款，事实上大多数都没有。但如果XBOX想保障未来产出、找到明日的《辐射》，就必须孵化古怪的新点子，承担相对廉价的风险；从长远看，这些风险可能孕育庞大IP。

paragraphs.en: Instead, it appears to be doubling down on series that are more than two decades old. Few would disagree that Halo’s best days are behind it; the very existence of Halo: Campaign Evolved is tacit acknowledgement of that fact. Gears of War: E-Day looks like chunky, old-fashioned fun - but the novelty of having straightforward cover shooters back in the age of live-service will not hold forever. The original creators of these games have long since moved on, and their successors are beholden to old formulae. Eventually, these ancient husks will disintegrate into dust, and Xbox will be left with nothing new to turn to.
paragraphs.cn: 相反，它似乎正加倍押注已有20多年历史的系列。很少有人会否认《光环》的黄金时代已经过去，《光环：战役进化》的存在本身就是默认承认。《战争机器：事变日》看起来会是厚重又老派的乐趣，但在服务型游戏时代，直白掩体射击游戏回归的新鲜感不会永远持续。原作者早已离开，继任者受制于旧公式。最终，这些古老空壳会化为尘土，而XBOX将没有任何新事物可依靠。

paragraphs.en: “We are shifting from a planning model primarily centered on what’s next for each independent studio to one that focuses on our strongest franchises,” Bethesda head of studio Jill Braff wrote in a recent email to staff. “From there, we’ll align the right talent, technology, and resources across the organisation to deliver on those priorities.” It’s a statement that provides a glimpse into Microsoft’s new mindset: a return to the dying days of the Xbox 360, driven by top-down mandates, and intended to ensure the company’s hardware is backed up by killer apps.
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达工作室负责人Jill Braff在近期员工邮件中写道：「我们正在从主要围绕各独立工作室下一步规划的模式，转向聚焦最强IP。然后，我们会在整个组织内协调合适的人才、技术和资源，实现这些重点。」这番话让人窥见微软的新思路：回到XBOX 360末期，由上而下的命令驱动，确保公司硬件有杀手级应用支撑。

paragraphs.en: Even by its own stated goals, however, Xbox seems to be setting itself up to fail. Inarguably, one of Bethesda’s strongest franchises is The Elder Scrolls. Yet in the wake of Sharma’s layoffs, “as much as half” of the team behind The Elder Scrolls Online is gone. What’s more, over 50 employees at Bethesda Game Studios have been let go, an outcome that will have a “substantial and cascading effect” on the making of The Elder Scrolls 6 , according to multiple employees at the studio.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，即便按其自定目标衡量，XBOX似乎也在走向失败。贝塞斯达最强IP之一无疑是《上古卷轴》，但Sharma裁员后，《上古卷轴Online》团队「多达一半」成员离开；贝塞斯达游戏工作室也裁掉50多人，多名员工称，这会对《上古卷轴6》的制作产生「重大且连锁的影响」。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, id Software has been so dramatically drained of talent that one laid-off worker told GamesBeat they were “not convinced there is a viable way forward”. If Xbox is to double down on venerable series like Doom and Quake, you would imagine it might need the help of the developers who have successfully reinvented Doom on three separate occasions since the millennium. Are these the acts of somebody throwing resources behind sure bets?
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，id Software人才流失严重，一名被裁员工告诉GamesBeat，他「不相信还有可行的前进道路」。如果XBOX要加码《毁灭战士》《雷神之锤》等老牌系列，理应需要那些自世纪之交以来三度成功重塑《毁灭战士》的开发者。这真像是在为稳妥项目投入资源吗？

paragraphs.en: Sharma’s talk of streamlining, simplifying and flattening Xbox’s organisation more closely resembles the startup mentality of Silicon Valley - a worldview that values mobility over stability. It echoes Elon Musk, whose typical approach is to yank wires out of the machine, and discover afterwards whether any of them were essential. It’s not a way of thinking that necessarily belongs in the big-budget game business.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma所说的精简、简化和扁平化，更像硅谷创业心态，一种重流动、轻稳定的世界观。它呼应了Elon Musk的典型做法：先从机器里扯掉电线，再看哪些原来必不可少。这种思维未必适合大预算游戏业务。

paragraphs.en: Listen to developers, and they’ll tell you that great games are built by teams with a shared shorthand and institutional knowledge that can only be fostered over long years in each others’ company. Every time an outfit like id Software or Bethesda Game Studios is wracked by layoffs, that bond is damaged, and the scars show in subsequent projects.
paragraphs.cn: 听开发者说，他们会告诉你，优秀游戏由拥有共同默契和组织知识的团队打造，而这些只能在多年共事中培养。每当id Software或贝塞斯达游戏工作室遭受裁员，这种联系就会受损，伤疤也会在后续项目中显现。

paragraphs.en: If Obsidian is now beginning work on its first Fallout game in a decade and a half, it does so at a disadvantage - minus a quarter of its staff . The studio has long produced great work under dire circumstances, and I’m sure will do so again. Over the course of its fraught history, uncertainty and instability has sadly been the norm rather than the exception.
paragraphs.cn: 如果黑曜石现在开始制作15年来首款《辐射》，它一开始就处于劣势，因为四分之一员工已经离开。该工作室长期以来都能在恶劣环境下产出优秀作品，我相信这次也会如此。遗憾的是，在其坎坷历史中，不确定与不稳定才是常态。

paragraphs.en: But as for the franchises that will follow Fallout? The ones that will ensure Xbox can survive for another two decades, and sell its consoles far into the future? It’s unclear where they’ll come from. The incubation chambers are broken, and nothing new grows.
paragraphs.cn: 但《辐射》之后的IP呢？那些确保XBOX再生存20年、让主机继续销售到遥远未来的作品呢？没人知道它们会从何而来。孵化室已经损坏，再也长不出新东西。

paragraphs.en: Jeremy Peel is a freelance journalist and friend to anyone who will look at photos of his dogs.
paragraphs.cn: Jeremy Peel是一名自由记者，也是所有愿意看他爱犬照片的人的朋友。

opus_summary: XBOX裁撤或剥离创意工作室、转而押注《光环》《战争机器》《上古卷轴》等旧IP，却同时削弱这些系列的开发团队。文章认为，这会摧毁孕育下一个《辐射》的环境。
